hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in *.vue|*.js|*.html|*.liquid) npx prettier --write "$FILE" ;; esac
CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE 'rm -rf|drop table|truncate|format c:|del /f'; then echo "Blocked dangerous command: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'
echo '=== Git Status ===' && git status --short 2>/dev/null || echo 'Not a git repo'; echo '=== Recent commits ===' && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null || true
